---
title: "Isabella Sutton"
subtitle: "Undergraduate Student"
description: "Brief description of research interests and role in the lab. Edit this file to customize your profile."
image: avatar.jpg
group: undergrad
order: 1
toc: false
---

::: {.profile-header}
![](avatar.JPG)

# Graduate Student Name {.name}

::: {.subtitle}
Undergraduate Honors Thesis Student | Department of Psychology | Western University
:::

:::

## About

I am a fourth year Honours psychology student interested in researching women’s sexual desire and pleasure, as well as sexual compatibility, inclusive sex education, and responses to sexual trauma. I joined the MaRSS Lab and found my love of research in 2025, where I continue to act as a research assistant, assisting in a synthesis of interventions for women's low sexual desire. 
When I'm not coding effects I can be found cuddling my dog, Atticus, and having intense Star Wars marathons.

## Research Interests

- Sexual dysfunctions
- Sex therapy techniques
- Sexual compatibility

## Education

- **B.A.** — Western University

## Contact

- {{< fa envelope >}} [isutton2@uwo.ca](mailto:isutton2@uwo.ca)
